description: Quo is a business phone and customer communication platform for calls, text messages, contacts, and related workflow data. It provides shared workspace access to conversations, users, calls, tasks, and integrations for businesses.
summary: Quo exposes two versioned REST API surfaces at https://api.quo.com authenticated by Quo-issued API keys, plus an official remote MCP server at https://mcp.quo.com/mcp using OAuth-based account connection.
